# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "servicePrincipalName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name for the Service Principal (Azure AD Application display name). This name must be unique within your Azure AD tenant."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the deployment script's temporary resources (storage account, container instance). This does not affect the location of the Service Principal itself."
      }
    },
    "roleAssignmentGuid": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[newGuid()]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "A GUID for the role assignment. A new one will be generated if not provided. This should be unique to prevent deployment failures."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "contributorRoleDefinitionId": "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().id, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c')]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Resources/deploymentScripts",
      "apiVersion": "2020-10-01",
      "name": "createServicePrincipalScript",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      },
      "kind": "AzureCLI",
      "properties": {
        "forceUpdateTag": "[parameters('servicePrincipalName')]",
        "azCliVersion": "2.53.0",
        "scriptContent": "SP_PASSWORD=$(date +%s | sha256sum | base64 | head -c 32 | tr -d '\\n')\nSP_DISPLAY_NAME=\"[parameters('servicePrincipalName')]\"\n\n# Create AAD Application\n# The identity executing this script (system-assigned managed identity) must have 'Application Administrator' role in Azure AD.\nAPP_DETAILS=$(az ad app create --display-name \"${SP_DISPLAY_NAME}\" --password \"${SP_PASSWORD}\" --query \"{appId:appId,objectId:id}\" -o json)\nAPP_ID=$(echo $APP_DETAILS | jq -r .appId)\nAPP_OBJECT_ID=$(echo $APP_DETAILS | jq -r .objectId)\n\n# Create Service Principal for the application\nSP_DETAILS=$(az ad sp create --id \"${APP_ID}\" --query \"{principalId:id}\" -o json)\nSP_PRINCIPAL_ID=$(echo $SP_DETAILS | jq -r .principalId)\n\n# Output necessary IDs and client secret for subsequent resources and template outputs\nOUTPUTS_JSON=$(jq -n \\\n  --arg appId \"${APP_ID}\" \\\n  --arg principalId \"${SP_PRINCIPAL_ID}\" \\\n  --arg clientSecret \"${SP_PASSWORD}\" \\\n  '{appId: $appId, principalId: $principalId, clientSecret: $clientSecret}')\necho $OUTPUTS_JSON > $AZ_SCRIPTS_OUTPUT_PATH",
        "timeout": "PT30M",
        "cleanupPreference": "OnSuccess",
        "arguments": ""
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[parameters('roleAssignmentGuid')]",
      "scope": "[subscription().id]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deploymentScripts', 'createServicePrincipalScript')]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[variables('contributorRoleDefinitionId')]",
        "principalId": "[reference('createServicePrincipalScript').outputs.principalId]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "servicePrincipalAppId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference('createServicePrincipalScript').outputs.appId]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The Application (client) ID of the created Service Principal. Use this as AZURE_CLIENT_ID for authentication."
      }
    },
    "servicePrincipalPrincipalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference('createServicePrincipalScript').outputs.principalId]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The Object ID of the created Service Principal. This is the identifier used in role assignments."
      }
    },
    "servicePrincipalClientSecret": {
      "type": "securestring",
      "value": "[reference('createServicePrincipalScript').outputs.clientSecret]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The client secret for the Service Principal. Treat this as highly sensitive information and store it securely (e.g., in a Key Vault or CI/CD secret variable). Avoid exposing it in logs."
      }
    },
    "tenantId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[subscription().tenantId]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The Tenant ID where the Service Principal was created. Use this as AZURE_TENANT_ID for authentication."
      }
    }
  }
}
